MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

Prior to the hearing, the Court was informed that this case has settled.

Therefore, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and orders that DEFENDANT EVEREST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar.
